findings.description: envCounts object re-computed inside .map() callback (4 iterations per render) — should be memoized or moved outside the map
onFiltersChange: when environment changes, non-environment fields in `next` are silently dropped. Safe in practice (sequential UI changes) but logically impure
New Eye/View button in ClusterActions has no dedicated E2E test — existing cluster detail test covers the flow via row click, so coverage is adequate
